summary: Phase 4 backend testing completed successfully. All achievement endpoints and admin stats endpoints are working correctly with proper permission controls and data validation.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/stats/students (admin only) - returns student statistics with total, per grade (7/8/9), and mutations
GET /api/admin/stats/students (non-admin) - correctly returns 403 forbidden
GET /api/admin/stats/achievements (admin only) - returns achievement statistics by level and holder type
GET /api/achievements - returns all achievements with backward compatibility
GET /api/achievements?holder_type=siswa - filters siswa achievements only
GET /api/achievements?holder_type=guru - filters guru achievements only
GET /api/achievements?holder_type=tendik - filters tendik achievements only
GET /api/achievements?holder_type=madrasah - filters madrasah achievements only
GET /api/achievements?year=2025 - filters achievements by year
GET /api/achievements?level=nasional - filters achievements by level
POST /api/achievements (siswa for self) - siswa can create achievement for themselves
POST /api/achievements (siswa for other) - correctly returns 403 when siswa tries to create for another student
POST /api/achievements (guru for self) - guru can create achievement for themselves
POST /api/achievements (guru for other) - correctly returns 403 when guru tries to create for another guru
POST /api/achievements (tendik for self) - tendik can create achievement for themselves
POST /api/achievements (madrasah by admin) - admin can create madrasah achievement with holder_id=null
POST /api/achievements (madrasah by non-admin) - correctly returns 403 when non-admin tries to create madrasah achievement
POST /api/achievements (year auto-derive) - year automatically derives from date field when year is empty
POST /api/achievements (invalid holder_type) - correctly returns 400 for invalid holder_type
PUT /api/achievements/{id} - owner can edit unverified achievement
PUT /api/achievements/{id}/verify (admin) - admin can verify achievements
PUT /api/achievements/{id}/verify (wali_kelas) - wali_kelas can verify achievements
DELETE /api/achievements/{id} (owner) - owner can delete their own achievement
DELETE /api/achievements/{id} (admin) - admin can delete any achievement
Regression: GET /api/health - still working
Regression: GET /api/schedules - still working
Regression: GET /api/users - still working

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested (backend only testing as per review request)
